summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Upcoming Birthdays feature. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly with sidebar widget and dashboard section.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/management/birthdays/upcoming?days=10 returns 200
Backend: Birthday endpoint returns list of birthdays
Backend: Birthday response has all required fields (id, name, company_name, phone, birthday_date, days_until, turning_age, is_today)
Backend: days_until calculation is correct (0-30 range)
Backend: is_today flag correctly set based on days_until
Backend: Birthdays sorted by days_until ascending
Backend: days parameter filters correctly (5 days vs 30 days)
Backend: phone field present in response
Backend: turning_age calculation is correct
Backend: Specific test member (Vikram Kukreja) appears with correct data
Frontend: Sidebar birthday widget appears with cake icon
Frontend: Sidebar widget shows badge count (1)
Frontend: Sidebar widget has pink gradient styling
Frontend: Dashboard birthday section exists with 'Upcoming Birthdays' header
Frontend: Birthday item shows member name (Vikram Kukreja)
Frontend: Birthday item shows company name (To Be Honest Circle LLP)
Frontend: Birthday item shows phone number (9871118142)
Frontend: Birthday item shows birthday date (Sun, 15 Mar)
Frontend: Birthday item shows days until (In 2 days)
Frontend: No 'Today!' badge for future birthday (correct behavior)
Frontend: Birthday widget click scrolls to birthday section
critical_code_review_comments: Birthday API endpoint correctly calculates days_until and turning_age
API correctly handles year boundary for birthdays (if birthday passed this year, shows next year)
Birthdays are properly sorted by days_until (closest first)
Sidebar widget correctly fetches birthdays with days=10 parameter
Dashboard section fetches birthdays with days=30 parameter
Phone number is displayed with emoji prefix (📱)
Birthday date formatted correctly (weekday, day month)
is_today flag correctly determines special styling
seed_data_creation: Used existing test member Vikram Kukreja (ID: 1288f840-4816-48bb-a4ae-c4d3aa4d00f8) with DOB 1992-03-15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Upcoming Birthdays feature fully implemented and tested. API endpoint: GET /api/management/birthdays/upcoming?days=N returns members with upcoming birthdays. Response includes: id, name, email, phone, company_name, date_of_birth, birthday_date, days_until, turning_age, is_today. Sidebar widget shows birthdays in next 10 days with badge count. Dashboard section shows birthdays in next 30 days with full details. Today's birthdays get special styling with 'Today!' badge and pink gradient background.

birthday_api.filtering: Only returns active members with date_of_birth set

sidebar_widget.badge: Shows count of birthdays in next 10 days
sidebar_widget.styling: Pink gradient background with cake icon
sidebar_widget.click_action: Scrolls to birthday section on dashboard

dashboard_section.today_styling: Pink gradient background, Gift icon, 'Today!' badge, 'Turning X 🎉' text
